description: NapkinDab Phase 5 configuration — mid-session context cleanup for mK:a

tool_output.description: Raw output from bash/python tool calls
tool_output.notes: High volume, low retention value after acknowledgment

scaffold.description: Structural injection markers, session headers, phase labels
scaffold.notes: Pure scaffolding -- no semantic content after setup phase

injection_ack.description: Assistant acknowledgment of a memory injection
injection_ack.notes: Once acknowledged, the ack itself has no retention value

repeated_context.notes: Detected by content comparison in MessageBuffer

old_memory_dump.description: Full memory dump injections from earlier in session
old_memory_dump.notes: Superseded by more recent injections or NapkinDab summaries

user_message.notes: Never remove -- user messages define the session intent

priority_injection.description: High-priority memory injected at session start or by trigger

critical_warning.description: Warnings about dangerous actions, irreversible operations

task_context.notes: Defines what the assistant is trying to accomplish

napkin_event_messages.message: [NAPKIN_DAB] Exchange {exchange}. Compacted buffer: {before} to {after} messages. Session focus preserved.
[NAPKIN_DAB] Buffer at capacity ({size} msgs). Trimmed to last {keep} exchanges.
[NAPKIN_DAB] Manual compact. Removed {removed} messages. Core context intact.
